Breath of Harmony  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Item Benefit Niv's Melody of Preservation (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
Recast Delay: 1 seconds, Recast Type: 51
WT: 0.8 Size: MEDIUM
Class: BRD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Charges: Unlimited

DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 37,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 54

This item is found on creatures.

Old Sebilis
NPC Name
blood of chottal

Zone Name
Old Sebilis

« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
2020 Mangler Video
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2020 at 3:43 AM Rating: Excellent
ibc93
Scholar
47 posts
Pretty rare drop from Sebilis. Need lockpick or some means to aggro Chottal through the locked door. I.E. critical lull failure for example with low Charisma stat. On p99, I believe it must be equipped to cast but on live it can be casted from inventory & made into a macro /useitem breath of harmony. Did a video guide talking about how I could stack BoH's niv's with Lute of the Flowing Waters to do a 6 song perma-twist: https://youtu.be/7_pXzI7Zzpo

Still Drops, Rarely !

Is it really that ugly?
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2003 at 12:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592789781525
Scholar
146 posts
Got one for my bard and it doesn't look too bad, actually. The wide part of the sword is somewhat transparant which tones down the bulkiness of it. Still a bit long than I'd like but all in all I'm very happy with this sword.

[previously]
The graphic above in the description shows a big gangly wide sword. Is this really how it looks? My bard has Defender's Lightblade in the offhand and it's a really nice looking weap. Yeh yeh, function before form but I wish it would look more like the lean, low delay, weap that it is.

Edited, Tue Jul 22 14:51:57 2003

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 06 2002 at 12:27 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This doesnt make any sense to me...does it to any of you???
RE: Effect
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2002 at 7:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756538643
18 posts
Niv's Definitly has:
1. a Str Bonus
2. a Regen Component
3. a Small *Spell* Damage Absorbtion

the Atk Bonus is a Result of the Strength increase.

Any Questions? :D
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 06 2002 at 12:27 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This doesnt make any sense to me...does it to any of you???
RE: Effect
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2002 at 11:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344578300
View User Forum
8 posts
the spell does just what is says:

Party: Increase Strength (10 - 24)
Party: Increase Attack (10 - 21)
Party: Heal (10- 17)
Party: Absorb Spell Dmg (10-21)

Healing and damage absorbing are two differant things. One can look like the other but they are not the same. this spell has a 17hp regen, and also has a 21dmg absorb.

sorry you dissagree TYNDER
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 06 2002 at 12:26 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This doesnt make any sense to me...does it to any of you???
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 06 2002 at 12:26 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This doesnt make any sense to me...does it to any of you???
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 24 2002 at 8:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) oh ya
NO DOUBLE ATTACK
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2002 at 5:37 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247719290
64 posts
For all you people wondering why bards get weapons with very nice damage/delay the answer is simple:

BARDS DO NOT GET DOUBLE ATTACK!

What this means is a bard with this weapon (10/18) will do (almost) the same damage as a warior with a >> 10/36 << weapon.

And wariors get a lot better then 10/36.


Understand why? Good. Now stop nagging.
▲ Page top

# May 28 2002 at 10:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762323414
109 posts
I'm gonna have to Go with the Wristsnapper over this...

All bards say that the song doesn't stack with the DS songs, or the high Rune (damage obsorber) songs...the Wristsnapper is same ratio, with 5 ac, 7 agi, 7 int, 7 cha...and if you have better, can be put in ranged slot.

/shrug

Gallowbraid, 51 SK
Jhoval, 48 bard (proud owner of Wristsnapper)
▲ Page top
RE: hit like monk
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2003 at 12:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758885035
View User Forum
23 posts
Just an FYI, this effect stacks with both Psalm of Veeshan as well as Warsong of Zek, with those being the 2 high level DS's it definately stacks with them. As per runes, it does not stack with shield of songs but does stack with Nillipuss's march of the wee. Also stacks with Niv's Harmonic.

▲ Page top

It's triggered insta cast...which means a bard can twist 5sons if you include the boh
▲ Page top
BoH
QuoteReply
# May 02 2002 at 8:38 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592246115189
4 posts
Well, just my thoughts on this. I had this weapon paired with a wrist snapper, and although a pair of 10/18s were nice, I did some looking and realized there were also better for me. With the lute of the hower, and a sash of the dragon born, I found that I got better damage out of a lsoee main hand, and a guardians mace off hand. I recently hit 52, and when you add in Battle cry of Valshir, there is clearly no choice for me.

The weapon becomes clickable at 50, and the effect lasts for 3 ticks. It is also without instrament effects, so unless you have your epic, not really worth it in my opinion, and even then, I would say probably not.

Edited, Thu May 2 09:33:34 2002
▲ Page top

▲ Page top
I like it!
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2002 at 10:52 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591758758590
46 posts
Excellent weapon, 0 cast time...10/18 ratio 0.8 weight...allows us bards to actually deal some melee damage when fear kiting. Try this... charm kite 2 mobs, once one goes down (you have to do some damage to it via dot or dd etc or just hit it) fear kite the second...with weapons like this one they go down fast enough to make solo worthwhile!
